title: Minecraft Re-Imagined
description: Improve your Minecraft experience with these great mods!
body:
Improve your Minecraft experience with these amazing mods! Minecraft Re-Imagined adds multiple mods that improve Minecraft's visuals, gameplay, and more. Download this if you want to revamp your Minecraft experience, while not changing much of the gameplay. Remember, your feedback is always welcome!

This will most likely not run well on older computers, even with the perfomance mods. This modpack has a **lot** of mods, and that usually doesn't pair well with old computers.

Feel free to change which resource packs are enabled to your liking!

I would reccomend allocating at least 15k megabytes of RAM to Modrinth if you are experiencing frequent crashes. If you don't know how to do that, go to settiings then scroll down.

If you can't allocate enough RAM download an older version of the modpack.
